title: Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter Remake Game Reveals September 17 Launch in Trailer
content: Nihon Falcom and GungHo Online Entertainment revealed on Friday that they will release Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter ( Sora no Kiseki the 2nd ), the remake of the original The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky SC game, for PlayStation 5, Switch, Switch 2, and PC via Steam on September 17.
author: ANN

title: Love Live! Hasu no Sora Jōgakuin School Idol Club Film's Full Trailer Posted
content: The official website for the Love Live! Hasu no Sora Jogakuin School Idol Club Bloom Garden Party 3D anime film began streaming a trailer for the film on Thursday. The trailer shows Maika Kinjo and Aoi Reisawa tasked with documenting and filming the "Bloom Garden Party" event.
author: ANN

title: Love Live! Hasunosora Movie Unveils Main Trailer
content: Love Live! Hasunosora Girls’ High School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party movie unveiled its main trailer on Thursday. It is slated to premiere this coming May 8 in Japanese theaters.
author: Anime Corner

title: 13 Junji Ito Manga Stories Get Live-Action Omnibus Series on July 3
content: TV Tokyo announced on Friday that it is producing a live-action omnibus series based on 13 manga stories by Junji Ito . The series will premiere in the TV Tokyo channel's "Drama 24" programming block on July 3 at 24:12 (effectively, July 4 at 12:12 a.m.), and on BS TV Tokyo on July 12.
author: ANN

title: L'étoile de Paris en fleur Anime Film's 1st 11 Minutes Streamed
content: The official website for Paris ni Saku Étoile ( L'étoile de Paris en fleur or Étoile Blossoming in Paris), an original anime film from director Gorō Taniguchi ( Code Geass , One Piece Film Red ) and Arvo Animation , streamed the first 11 minutes of the film on Friday. The film opened in Japan on March 13.
author: ANN

title: Neo Geo AES Returns as Cartridge-Based Console Without Using Software Emulation
content: SNK and Plaion Replai announced on Thursday that they will release the NeoGeo AES+, a new console based on SNK 's original Neo Geo AES home console, on November 12. Unlike recent retro console releases that use software emulation or FPGA chips, the AES+ will use ASIC chips like the original, making the new console…
author: ANN

title: The Prince of Tennis Romance Games' English-Subtitled Remasters Slated for July 30
content: Konami confirmed on Thursday that its remastered versions of The Prince of Tennis Sweet School Festival ♡-40 and more... ( Shin Tennis no Ōji-sama : Mo~tto Gakuen-sai no Ōji-sama ♡-40 and more... ) and The Prince of Tennis Doki Doki Survival eternal passion ( Shin Tennis no Ōji-sama : Gyu~tto!
author: ANN

title: Every Major Shonen Jump Series Cancelled in 2026 So Far, Ranked by How Disappointed We Are
content: Almost four full months into 2026, Weekly Shonen Jump has cancelled four of its major manga series so far — and it’s sadder to see some of them go than others. Between series reaching their natural conclusions and less popular ones being cycled out to make room for new ones, a few cancellations at this point in the…
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action Blue Lock Film Announces Team V's Cast in Video
content: The official website for the live-action film based on Muneyuki Kaneshiro and Yūsuke Nomura 's BLUE LOCK soccer manga presented a new video on Friday. The video announces three more cast members for the film, who all play members of Team V's ace trio.
author: ANN

title: Honkai Star Rail Animation Project by MAPPA Reveals Concept Trailer
content: Honkai: Star Rail X MAPPA original animation project revealed a concept trailer, which is titled “Death in the Afternoon.” Not many details were shared about the project, with only the director and character designer revealed.
author: Anime Corner
